item.name: 13 - Emergency Bed Management
item.description: Assign, transfer, or release the bed for an emergency patient. All operations are transactional — bed state is atomically updated alongside the emergency visit record. Use these AFTER creating the emergency visit via the OPD service (POST /opd/emergency).

request.description: Assign an AVAILABLE bed to an emergency visit. Old bed is automatically released. Returns 409 if the target bed is already OCCUPIED.
Transfer an emergency patient to a different bed. The previous bed is automatically set to AVAILABLE and the new bed is set to OCCUPIED in a single transaction.
Release the bed currently assigned to an emergency visit. Use when the patient is discharged or admitted to IPD. Sets the bed back to AVAILABLE and clears the assigned_bed_id on the visit.

variable.description: Emergency visit ID from OPD service POST /opd/emergency
AVAILABLE bed UUID to assign to the emergency visit
